definition: A clear step-by-step set of rules to solve a problem or task.
example: Route apps use an algorithm to pick the fastest road.

definition: A nutrient from grains, fruit, and starch that gives quick energy.
A race where teammates take turns; also an electrical switch.
Living things and their environment working as one system.
example: Removing wolves changed the whole forest ecosystem.

definition: Something that speeds a reaction without being used up.
example: Enzymes act as catalysts inside cells.
